rules.name: von_frau_person
rules.description: Captures persons identified by 'von Frau' followed by a full name (First and Last).

rules.name: title_priv_doz_in
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Priv.-Doz.in' followed by name.

rules.name: title_okr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'ÖkR' followed by full name, including preceding titles like 'Dr.in'.

rules.name: title_hon_prof_dr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Hon.-Prof. Dr.' followed by name.

rules.name: title_hr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'HR' or 'Techn R HR' followed by full name, including suffixes, excluding trailing commas.

rules.name: title_univ_prof
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Univ.-Prof.' (including repeated titles) followed by name.

rules.name: title_dr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Dr.' followed by full name, ensuring umlauts are included and matching stops at punctuation, including 'von'.

rules.name: title_vetr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'KommR VetR' or 'VetR' followed by full name.

rules.name: herr_frau_person
rules.description: Captures persons identified by 'Herr', 'Herrn', or 'Frau' followed by a full name including suffixes like LLM, MSc. Excludes the title from the match.

rules.name: title_ost_r
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'OStR' followed by full name, including suffixes.

rules.name: title_dr_in_priv_doz_in
rules.description: Captures persons with compound title 'Dr.in Priv.-Doz.in' followed by full name.

rules.name: name_after_nachname_wie_bf
rules.description: Captures names immediately following the specific legal marker '(Nachname wie Bf.)'.

rules.name: name_after_fuer_die_kinder
rules.description: Captures bare names following 'für die Kinder' (for the children), common in family benefit cases.

rules.name: name_after_an_die
rules.description: Captures names following 'an die', strictly excluding company names and organizations.

rules.name: known_person_names
rules.description: Matches specific known person entities from the training data to ensure high recall for these specific cases.
rules.content: (?:Larissa Gmelich|Benjamin Dittke|Dr\.in Olga Arai|Veronika Zeitlhuber|Dr\. Dr\. Erich Papadakis|Kirstin Hänßen|Lucia Norkeit|Olivia Püttmanns|Meinrad Kühnken)

rules.name: german_person_with_title
rules.description: DELETED: This rule was too broad and matched almost any capitalized word sequence.

rules.name: name_after_herr
rules.description: Captures names following 'Herr' (Mr.) in legal contexts.

rules.name: name_after_gegen
rules.description: Captures person names following 'gegen' (against) in legal contexts, excluding organizations.

rules.name: name_after_herrn
rules.description: Captures names following 'Herrn', including those with titles like OSR. Excludes 'Herrn' from the output.

rules.name: name_in_verwaltungsstrafsache
rules.description: Captures the person name in 'in der Verwaltungsstrafsache gegen [Name], [Address]'. Excludes titles like 'Herrn'.

rules.name: name_in_verwaltungsstrafsache_general
rules.description: Captures the person name in 'in der Verwaltungsstrafsache gegen [Name]' where the name might have a title or not.

rules.name: title_osr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'OSR' (Oberster Staatsanwalt) followed by name and optional suffixes like MA, BA.

rules.name: title_omedr_str
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'OMedR StR' followed by name.

rules.name: name_in_parenthetical
rules.description: Captures names in parenthetical contexts like '(Bf.)' or '(Beschwerdeführerin)' following a name.

rules.name: title_repeated
rules.description: Captures persons with repeated titles like 'Priv.-Doz. Priv.-Doz.' or 'ÖkR ÖkR', including 'von'.

rules.name: title_univ_prof_in
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Univ.-Prof.in' followed by full name.

rules.name: title_univ_prof_complex
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Univ.-Prof.' or 'Univ.-Prof.in' combined with 'OMedR' and 'Dr.', including hyphenated names and 'von'.

rules.name: title_hr_kzlr
rules.description: Captures persons with the specific title 'HR KzlR' followed by a full name.

rules.name: name_after_fuer
rules.description: Captures person names following the preposition 'für' (for).

rules.name: title_univ_prof_in_priv_doz_in
rules.description: Captures the specific complex title 'Univ.-Prof.in Priv.-Doz.in' followed by name.

rules.name: name_at_signature
rules.description: Captures person names at the end of a text block, typically after 'Grüßen' or similar closing phrases.

rules.name: title_complex_academic
rules.description: Captures persons with complex academic titles like 'Dipl.-Ing. Dr.in', 'Mag. Dr.', 'Univ.-Prof.in' followed by full name.

rules.name: name_in_genitive_with_address
rules.description: Captures names in genitive case followed by an address (comma + number), which is a strong indicator of a person.

rules.name: title_dr_in
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Dr.in' (including repeated 'Dr.in Dr.in') followed by name.

rules.name: title_prof_in
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Prof.in' (without Univ.-) followed by full name.

rules.name: title_hon_prof_complex
rules.description: Captures persons with complex title chains including 'Priv.-Doz.in', 'Mag.a', 'Mag. Priv.-Doz.', etc., including 'von'.

rules.name: medr_title
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'OMedR' or 'MedR' or 'PhD MedR' followed by name, including 'von' and suffixes, excluding trailing punctuation.

rules.name: title_prof_in_medr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Prof.in MedR' followed by full name.

rules.name: name_with_complex_prefix
rules.description: Captures persons with prefixes like 'MedR', 'VetR', 'Bakk.', 'Techn R' including repeated titles and suffixes, including 'von'.

rules.name: name_in_beschwerdesache_of
rules.description: Captures names following 'in der Beschwerdesache der/des' (genitive) to handle cases like 'der Ali Litwinov', excluding 'Frau' and organizations.

rules.name: name_after_richter_in
rules.description: Captures names following 'durch den Richter' or 'durch die Richterin', extracting only the name/title part.

rules.name: title_kommr_repeated
rules.description: Captures persons with repeated titles like 'KommR KommR' or 'KommR KzlR'.

rules.name: title_priv_doz_univ_prof
rules.description: Captures persons with combined titles 'Priv.-Doz. Univ.-Prof.' or 'Univ.-Prof. Priv.-Doz.'.

rules.name: name_after_role_parenthetical
rules.description: Captures names following 'des/der [Role] ([Abbrev])' pattern, e.g., 'des Beschwerdeführers (Bf) Name'.

rules.name: name_after_comma_role
rules.description: Captures bare names following a role description and a comma (e.g., 'Eigentümer, Titus Kurbjun').

rules.name: title_stR_fixed
rules.description: Captures 'StR' (Strafverteidiger) but excludes 'OStR' using word boundaries, updated to not conflict with complex titles.

rules.name: name_after_verb_context
rules.description: Captures names following verbs like 'hat', 'ist', 'war' in specific legal contexts (e.g., 'hat durch den Richter [Name]').

rules.name: title_combined_mag_hon
rules.description: Captures combined titles like 'Mag.a Hon.-Prof.in' or 'Mag. Prof.' or 'Hon.-Prof.in' followed by name.

rules.name: title_kzlr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'KzlR' (Kanzleirat) followed by name, including the title in the match.

rules.name: title_hon_prof_male
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Hon.-Prof.' (male) followed by name.

rules.name: title_priv_doz_male
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Priv.-Doz.' (male) followed by name.

rules.name: title_hon_prof_in_complex
rules.description: Captures complex titles like 'Mag.a Priv.-Doz.in Hon.-Prof.in' followed by name.

rules.name: name_in_parenthetical_tightened
rules.description: Captures names in parenthetical contexts, ensuring only the name is extracted, not preceding nouns. Excludes court names.

rules.name: title_priv_doz_dr
rules.description: Captures persons with compound title 'Priv.-Doz. Dr.' or 'Dr. Priv.-Doz.' followed by name, including 'von'.

rules.name: name_after_gegenüber_herrn
rules.description: Captures names following 'gegenüber Herrn' or 'gegenüber der' (genitive) to handle cases like 'gegenüber Herrn Rudolf Magerhans'.

rules.name: name_in_followup_context
rules.description: Captures names appearing in 'in der Folge kurz mit Bf.' or similar contexts where the name precedes the abbreviation.

rules.name: title_omedr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'OMedR' or 'Techn R OMedR' or 'VetR OMedR' followed by name.

rules.name: name_after_wurde_passive
rules.description: Captures names appearing after 'wurde' in passive constructions, e.g., 'wurde Yorick Hütther, in der Folge...'.

rules.name: title_kommr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Priv.-Doz.in KommR' or 'Kfm. StR' followed by name, ensuring full title is captured.

rules.name: name_in_list_context
rules.description: Captures names following phrases like 'nannte der Bf die folgenden Namen:' or similar list introductions.

rules.name: name_at_start_of_sentence_tightened
rules.description: Captures names at start of sentence, excluding common non-name words, organizations, and month names.

rules.name: title_kommir_ing
rules.description: Captures persons with the specific title 'KommR Ing.' followed by a full name, handling cases where it appears as a subject or object, including 'Limited'.

rules.name: name_after_herr_frau
rules.description: Captures full names following 'Herr' or 'Frau', ensuring at least two words are captured and allowing for suffixes like ', BSc', 'BA LLB', 'BEd'. Excludes list markers.

rules.name: title_rgr_phd
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'RgR' followed by 'PhD' and name, or just 'RgR' and name.

rules.name: title_mag_chain
rules.description: Captures 'Mag. Mag.' followed by name.

rules.name: title_rgR_univ_prof_in_kommR
rules.description: Captures the specific complex title 'RgR Univ.-Prof.in KommR' followed by a name.

rules.name: title_mag_a
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Mag.a' followed by full name, ensuring the full string is captured.

rules.name: name_after_ist
rules.description: Captures names following 'ist' (is), excluding corporate suffixes and honorifics like 'Herr' or 'Frau'.

rules.name: name_after_colon
rules.description: Captures person names appearing immediately after a colon, ensuring it looks like a name (at least two capitalized words) to avoid medical terms.

rules.name: title_herr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Hr.' or 'Herr' followed by name, extracting only the name.

rules.name: title_omdr_techn_r
rules.description: Captures persons with combined titles 'OMedR Techn R' or 'VetR Techn R' followed by name.

rules.name: title_ing_dr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Ing. Dr.' followed by name.

rules.name: title_dipl_kfm
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Dipl. Kfm.' followed by name.

rules.name: title_prof_phd
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Prof. PhD' followed by name.

rules.name: name_after_richter
rules.description: Captures names following 'Richter' or 'Richterin' with titles like 'Mag.', 'Dr.', 'Univ.-Prof.', etc.

rules.name: title_komr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'KommR' followed by name.

rules.name: title_ostR
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'OStR' (Obersteueranwalt) followed by name.

rules.name: title_ing
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Ing.' (Ingenieur) followed by full name, handling addresses.

rules.name: name_after_von
rules.description: Captures person names following 'von' (from) or 'von der/dem' (from the), excluding organizations and month names.

rules.name: title_hon_prof_in
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Hon.-Prof.in' (including complex chains like Mag.a Priv.-Doz.in Hon.-Prof.in) followed by full name.

rules.name: title_mag_complex
rules.description: Captures persons with complex Mag titles like 'Mag. Mag. Hon.-Prof.' or 'Mag.a Priv.-Doz.in Hon.-Prof.in'.

rules.name: title_priv_doz
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Priv.-Doz.' (including Dr. Dr. chains and complex title chains) followed by name, including 'von' and suffixes.

rules.name: title_stR_complex
rules.description: Captures complex titles including 'Priv.-Doz.in DDr.in StR', 'DDr.in StR', 'StR', 'Kfm. StR', 'Priv.-Doz.in KommR', 'OStR', and 'VetR OMedR' (if not caught by omedr).

rules.name: title_mag
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Mag.' or 'Mag.a' followed by name, including 'LLB' suffix.

rules.name: title_hon_prof
rules.description: Captures persons with compound title 'Dr. Hon.-Prof.' or 'Hon.-Prof.' followed by name.

rules.name: title_prof
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Univ.-Prof.' or 'Univ.-Prof.in' or 'Prof.' followed by name.

rules.name: judge_name_context
rules.description: Captures names of judges following 'durch den Richter' or 'durch die Richterin', including optional titles and suffixes.

rules.name: name_in_parentheses
rules.description: Captures names appearing in parentheses, often with a role description (e.g., 'als Bf bezeichnet').

rules.name: title_hr_full
rules.description: Captures 'HR' followed by full name, including preceding titles like 'Dipl.-Ing.', 'VetR', 'RgR', etc.

rules.name: name_after_des_genitive
rules.description: Captures names following 'des' in genitive contexts like 'Beschwerdesache des [Name]', extracting only the name.

rules.name: title_rgr_dipl_kff
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'RgR Dipl. Kff.' followed by name.

rules.name: name_after_mutter
rules.description: Captures names following 'Mutter' (Mother).

rules.name: name_in_beschwerdesache_tightened
rules.description: Captures the person name in 'in der Beschwerdesache' or 'in der Beschwerdesache des', including suffixes like BA, LLB.

rules.name: name_after_preposition_tightened
rules.description: Captures names following prepositions like 'für', 'von', 'gegen' in contexts where a person is likely, including optional suffixes.

rules.name: name_after_des_beschwerdesache
rules.description: Captures names following 'in der Beschwerdesache des' or 'in der Rechtssache des', extracting only the name.

rules.name: name_after_genitive_des
rules.description: Captures names following 'des' in genitive contexts, excluding organizations and common false positives.

rules.name: name_in_list
rules.description: Captures names in a list format, e.g., '1. Name, born...', ensuring the number is not part of the name and including suffixes.

rules.name: name_after_als
rules.description: Captures names following 'als' (as) in contexts like 'als Bf bezeichnet'.

rules.name: title_osr_ddr
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'OSR DDr.' or 'DDr.' followed by name.

rules.name: title_bakk_art
rules.description: Captures persons with academic degree 'Bakk. art.' or 'Bakk. techn.' or 'Bakk. iur.' following a name, ensuring the full name and suffix are captured.

rules.name: hr_in_beschwerdesache
rules.description: Captures 'HR [Name]' specifically in the context of 'Beschwerdesache', excluding the word 'Beschwerdesache' from the match.

rules.name: name_after_genitive_der
rules.description: Captures names following 'der' in genitive contexts, excluding organizations and common false positives.

rules.name: name_after_nominative_die_der
rules.description: Captures names following 'Die' or 'Der' in nominative contexts, excluding role words like 'Beschwerdeführer'.

rules.name: title_rgr_omedr
rules.description: Captures persons with titles like 'RgR OMedR' followed by name.

rules.name: name_with_suffix_general
rules.description: DELETED: Too broad, matches streets, cities, and organizations.

rules.name: title_dipl_ing
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'Dipl.-Ing.' followed by name.

rules.name: title_dr_in_univ_prof
rules.description: Captures persons with combined titles 'Dr.in Univ.-Prof.in' or 'Dr.in Prof.' or 'Univ.-Prof.in' followed by name.

rules.name: title_dr_in_hon_prof
rules.description: Captures persons with combined titles 'Dr.in Hon.-Prof.in' or 'Dr.in Hon.-Prof.' followed by name.

rules.name: title_phd
rules.description: Captures persons with title 'PhD' followed by name.

rules.name: title_ddr_complex
rules.description: Captures persons with compound titles like 'DDr.', 'Univ.-Prof.in', 'Hon.-Prof.in' followed by name and optional suffixes.
